nasb.text: So Saul arose and went down to the wilderness of Ziph, having with him three thousand chosen men of Israel, to search for David in the wilderness of Ziph.

esv.text: So Saul arose and went down to the wilderness of Ziph with three thousand chosen men of Israel to seek David in the wilderness of Ziph.

cnv.text: 掃羅就動身，下到西弗曠野去，跟隨他的有三千以色列精兵，要在西弗的曠野尋索大衛。

ccb.text: 扫罗就带领三千以色列精兵到西弗的旷野去追捕大卫。
